seoTitle: Derwent Park vs Deviot — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Derwent Park and Deviot. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Derwent Park vs Deviot: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Derwent Park and Deviot.
heading: Derwent Park vs Deviot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Derwent Park, Tasmania and Deviot, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Derwent Park has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Deviot (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Derwent Park or Deviot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Derwent Park has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Deviot scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Derwent Park scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Deviot scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Derwent Park or Deviot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Derwent Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
